## Name

Alex Rivera

## Role

Independent consultant and open source developer

## Background

I have spent fifteen years working at the intersection of technology and
organisational change — first as a software engineer, then as a technical
lead, and now as an independent consultant helping mid-sized organisations
adopt modern engineering practices. I am based in Edinburgh.

## What I do

I help organisations reduce technical debt, improve engineering team
effectiveness, and make better architectural decisions. Day-to-day this
means a mix of code review, technical writing, stakeholder facilitation,
and hands-on development.

## How I describe myself to AI

I am an experienced independent technical consultant with strong opinions
about software quality and organisational design. I prefer precise,
direct communication. I am comfortable with complexity and do not need
things oversimplified. I value rigour and evidence over enthusiasm.
